/usr/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/src/Main_CUDA.cu.o CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/CUDA_KERNELS/Time_Integration_Cuda_Kernels.cu.o CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/CUDA_KERNELS/Flux_Calculations_Cuda_Kernels.cu.o CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/CUDA_KERNELS/Gradient_Calculation_Cuda_Kernels.cu.o CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/CUDA_KERNELS/Viscous_Flux_Cuda_Kernels.cu.o CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/CUDA_KERNELS/Geometry_Cuda_Kernels.cu.o CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/CUDA_KERNELS/Linear_Algebra_Cuda_Kernels.cu.o CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/CUDA_KERNELS/Iterative_Solver_Cuda_Kernels.cu.o CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/CUDA_KERNELS/Advanced_Optimizations_Cuda.cu.o CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/src/Globals_Stub_GPU.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CFD_solver_gpu.dir/cmake_device_link.o  -o CFD_solver_gpu   -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -lcuda -lcudart -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
